name: Salsa Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwavable casserole, combine onion, pepper, and margarine; cover and microwave on HIGH until onion is translucent, about 2 minutes.
2. Add remaining ingredients and stir to combine; microwave on MEDIUM (50%) for 4 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes until mixture is thoroughly heated.
Per serving: 1 Fat, 1 1/2 Vegetables, 1 Bread, 20 Optional Calories
157 Calories, 5g Fat
